# Stacked Poker

> The easiest way to play poker for free or with crypto. No download, no sign up needed.

Stacked Poker (stackedpoker.io) is a browser-based multiplayer Texas Hold'em platform. Players can start a game instantly without creating an account — just open the site and play. For real-money games, connect a crypto wallet and use USDC on the Base blockchain.

## What it is

- Instant browser poker: no download, no account required
- Free play with unlimited chips for casual games and learning
- Real-money USDC tables on Base (currently testnet, mainnet coming soon)
- Full Texas Hold'em rules: 2–10 players, pre-flop through river, side pots, all-in, showdown
- Real-time multiplayer via WebSocket
- Spectator mode — watch games without playing

## Key Features

- In-game chat with custom emotes (7TV integration)
- Global leaderboard and points system
- Referral system with tier progression
- Visual customization: table colors (blue, green, red, white), card back designs (classic, Bitcoin, Ethereum, Base, USDC), 4-color deck option
- Dark/light mode, responsive design (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- Shareable rank cards for social sharing

## Who it's for

- Crypto-native users who want to play poker with USDC without KYC or account creation
- Casual players who want a quick free browser game with friends
- Competitive players drawn to leaderboards and tier progression
- Crypto communities running private tournaments

## Current status

The platform is in pre-launch / testnet phase. Free games are available now. We are organizing community tournaments with prize pools for crypto communities. Join the Discord to be among the first players in early tourneys.

## Tech

Frontend: Next.js 14, React, Chakra UI, Thirdweb SDK, Three.js
Backend: Go, PostgreSQL, Redis
Blockchain: Subsquid indexer on Base Sepolia; USDC on Base

## Pages

- / — Landing page with feature overview and FAQ
- /free-tokens — Get testnet USDC to play crypto tables
- /leaderboard — Global points rankings
- /public-games — Browse and join open tables
- /create-game — Create a custom poker table
- /table/[id] — Live game interface

## Contact / Community

Website: https://stackedpoker.io
